facts: Pit bulls have been given a bad rap. BADRAP was started in the San Francisco Bay area on behalf of "pit bulls and their people" and was ranked nationally as a No. 1 high-impact nonprofit for animal welfare.
A dog’s sense of smell is more than 100,000 times stronger than that of a human.
Dogs can see in color, but not as vividly as humans.
The French Bulldog is incapable of reproducing naturally.
There are an estimated 900 million dogs in the world.
